blocks.body: Form: be + V3 is the basic passive form. The verb be changes in tense, while the V3 (Past Participle) remains the same. Here you will learn V3 formation and word order in the passive voice.

{ "title": "6. Short summary", "items": [ "Passive formula: be + V3 (Past Participle).", "The verb be changes tenses, V3 does not.", "Regular verbs: V3 = V2 = V + ed (cleaned, opened).", "Irregular verbs: special form V3 (written, made, built).", "Objection: be + not + V3.", "Question: Be + Subject + V3?", "Memorize the most frequent irregular V3 for the passive!" ] }
